creator: freebsd-bug-report-yf@yf.bsdclub.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #3)
Hello,

> So you must have unexpected files in some locations that breaks the build process.

I think those 'unexpected files' are old distfiles that fetched on 'go-post-fetch' phase in building older version of the port. (I also sometimes met the situation).

Perhaps if we use DIST_SUBDIR with port version unique, the problem is gone.
